newContent:
import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import { AmplitudeProvider } from 'amplitude-js/react'
import './index.css'
import App from './App.tsx'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <AmplitudeProvider
      apiKey={import.meta.env.VITE_PUBLIC_AMPLITUDE_KEY}
      options={{
        api_host: import.meta.env.VITE_PUBLIC_AMPLITUDE_HOST,
        defaults: '2025-05-24',
        capture_exceptions: true,
        debug: import.meta.env.MODE === 'development',
      }}
    >
      <App />
    </AmplitudeProvider>
  </StrictMode>,
)
